title: Boyz4Cobblemon
description: A modpack made for (and by) the well known Dutch boyband "Boyz4Men" Featuring Cobblemon and Create as the primary mods.
body:
A modpack made for (and by) the well known Dutch boyband "Boyz4Men" Featuring Cobblemon and Create as the primary mods. 

Featuring mods such as:

Cobblemon,
Create,
Waystones,
Sophisticated Bacpkacks,
Xaero's World Map & Minimap,
Shaders + Performance Optimization Mods,

Full mod list:

AppleSkin by squeek
Architectury by shedaniel
BaguetteLib by Leclowndu93150
Balm by BlayTheNinth
Caelus API by Illusive Soulworks
Charm of Undying by Illusive Soulworks

Cobblemon Capture XP by timinc aka Timothy Metcalfe
Construction Sticks by Mrbysco, ShyNieke
Continuity by PepperCode1
Controlling by Jaredlll08
Create by simibubi
Create Contraption Terminals by tom5454

Curios API by C4
